li.label: cyber-fragile
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has never been comfortable sharing a body with machines. [PAWN_pronoun] reaches cyberpsychosis from far less augmentation than most.

li.label: cyber-stable
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] feels more at home as a machine than as a human. It takes a great deal of augmentation to push [PAWN_objective] toward cyberpsychosis.

li.label: the Chosen
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was born to wear chrome. Where others fracture under a handful of implants, [PAWN_pronoun] could replace nearly [PAWN_possessive] whole body and stay perfectly [PAWN_pronoun]self. Cyberpsychosis is almost beyond [PAWN_objective].
